call_type.reason: The conversation involves purchasing an E-Rickshaw for commercial passenger use, discussing dealer vs. retail pricing, and dealership territories.

buyer_intent.narrative: Wants to purchase a Yatri Passenger E-Rickshaw and is comparing prices between different dealerships to get the best on-road deal.
buyer_intent.reasoning: The buyer has already spoken to other dealers (Atut Sangam) and is now negotiating with the main distributor for a lower on-road price including registration papers.

buyer_conclusion.conclusion_notes: Will discuss further on the personal mobile number provided (Personal number pe baat karenge)

buyer_queries.query: Is there a dealership in Muzaffarpur? (Muzaffarpur mein dealership hai kya?)
What is the starting price for iron body models? (Loha body mein kitna se starting hai?)
Will I get a better rate if I come directly to your dealership? (Direct aapke dealership pe aaye toh rate sahi mil jayega?)

seller_queries.query: Do you want to take it on finance? (Finance pe lena tha kya?)

price.offer_details: Seller offered a special on-road price of 1,30,000 INR including papers and delivery to Muzaffarpur.
price.price_negotiation_notes: Dealer rate mentioned as 1,20,000; Customer on-road rate is usually 1,35,000 or higher (up to 1,65,000 at other dealers).
price.price_reaction_by_buyer: Negotiating: (Customer hai toh do-paanch jagah puchenge)
